root_text.sn37.14:1.1: “Pañcahi, anuruddha, dhammehi samannāgato mātugāmo …pe… nirayaṁ upapajjati.
root_text.sn37.14:1.3: Pāṇātipātī ca hoti, adinnādāyī ca hoti, kāmesumicchācārī ca hoti, musāvādī ca hoti, surāmerayamajjappamādaṭṭhāyī ca hoti—
root_text.sn37.14:1.4: imehi kho, anuruddha, pañcahi dhammehi samannāgato mātugāmo kāyassa bhedā paraṁ maraṇā apāyaṁ duggatiṁ vinipātaṁ nirayaṁ upapajjatī”ti.

translation_text.sn37.14:1.1: “Anuruddha, when ladies have five qualities, when their body breaks up, after death, they are reborn in a place of loss, a bad place, the underworld, hell.
translation_text.sn37.14:1.3: They kill living creatures, steal, commit sexual misconduct, lie, and consume beer, wine, and liquor intoxicants.
translation_text.sn37.14:1.4: When ladies possess these five qualities, when their body breaks up, after death, they are reborn in a place of loss, a bad place, the underworld, hell.”

variant_text.sn37.14:2.1: puriso ca → dve manāpā amanāpā ca (sya-all)
variant_text.sn37.14:2.2: tidhammo ca → āveṇiko tīhi dhammehi (bj); āveṇikā tīhi anuruddho (sya-all)
